page_metadata.biotools__summary: PyUNIxMD is an object-oriented Python program for molecular dynamics simulations involving multiple electronic states. It is mainly for studying the nonadiabatic dynamics of excited molecules.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PyUNIxMD is an object-oriented Python program for molecular dynamics simulations involving multiple electronic states. It is mainly for studying the nonadiabatic dynamics of excited molecules.
